subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Bear thou witness in thyself, in thine essence and in thy spirit, that verily He is God, there is no God but Me, the Mighty One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی فاشهد فی نفسک و ذاتک و روحک بانه هو الله لا اله الا انا العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
